summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FrameBook Pro Admin Panel features including Quotations, Invoices, Calendar/Walk-ins, Leads, Expenses, and Reports. All features working correctly.

issues: Event ID shown as UUID instead of event name (e.g., 'ec7ae749-6bfc-49c8-94e6-825a3d66b878' instead of 'Wedding 4')

action_items: Minor: Display event name instead of event_id on Expenses page for better UX
critical_code_review_comments: React useEffect missing dependency warnings in CalendarView.js and ReportsView.js - should add eslint-disable comment or include dependencies
DialogContent components missing Description/aria-describedby - accessibility improvement needed
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed leads and walk-ins
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel features are working. Quotations, Invoices, Calendar/Walk-ins, Leads, Expenses, Reports all have full CRUD functionality. PDF download uses browser print dialog via pdfGenerator utility. Demo data includes packages (Basic/Premium/Luxury Wedding), addons (Extra Hour, Drone Photography, Photo Booth), and 6 leads.

quotations.list_view: PASS - Shows quotations with status badges, totals, action buttons
quotations.create: PASS - Dialog with customer selection, packages, addons, custom items, discount%, tax%
quotations.pdf_download: PASS - PDF data endpoint works, uses browser print dialog

invoices.list_view: PASS - Shows invoices with payment status, totals, action buttons
invoices.add_payment: PASS - Payment dialog with amount, method, notes

calendar.view: PASS - Monthly calendar with event indicators
calendar.create_walkin: PASS - Block time with title, dates, times, notes

leads.status_change: PASS - Dropdown with New/Contacted/Follow Up/Quotation Sent/Confirmed/Lost

expenses.list_view: PASS - Shows expenses with event, category, amount
expenses.create: PASS - Add expense with event, category, amount, description, date

reports.revenue: PASS - Total Revenue, Collected, Pending, Total Profit cards
reports.lead_conversion: PASS - Total Leads, Confirmed, Lost, Conversion Rate
reports.monthly_revenue: PASS - Monthly breakdown with revenue and paid amounts
reports.event_profit: PASS - Event profitability with revenue, expenses, profit
